courses.title: Alphabet Adventure (A to Z)
courses.description: Learn all 26 letters with fun stories and pictures!

assignments.title: Color the letter A
assignments.instructions: Find the letter A and color it with your favorite color!

assignments.title: Draw 3 things starting with B
assignments.instructions: Draw three things that start with B (Ball, Bird, Banana)

assignments.title: Circle all C's in text
assignments.instructions: Find and circle letter C wherever you see it

assignments.title: Trace letter D
assignments.instructions: Carefully trace the letter D 5 times

assignments.instructions: Write letters from A to E on paper

assignments.title: F sound words
assignments.instructions: List 5 words that start with F

assignments.title: G is for green
assignments.instructions: Color things green and draw 2 green items

assignments.instructions: Practice writing H correctly 10 times

assignments.instructions: Draw or write about your favorite ice cream

assignments.instructions: Draw jelly and write the word J-E-L-L-Y

assignments.instructions: Color a kite with two colors

assignments.instructions: Draw a lion and write the letter L

assignments.instructions: Draw a monkey and trace the letter M

assignments.title: Vowel Review
assignments.instructions: Write all vowels (A, E, I, O, U) and draw one picture for each

assignments.title: Letter N and O
assignments.instructions: Practice N and O - write each 5 times

assignments.title: P Q R Racing
assignments.instructions: Write P, Q, R and tell which one is your favorite

assignments.title: S Snake Zigzag
assignments.instructions: Draw a zigzag snake and write S on it

assignments.instructions: Draw a tree and write T at the top

assignments.instructions: Color an umbrella with many colors

courses.title: Number Magic (1-100)
courses.description: Discover the fun world of counting and numbers!

assignments.instructions: Draw or paste 10 objects and count them aloud
